mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diaries (user_id, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{contentText}, #{writtenDate}, COALESCE(#{visibility}, 'PRIVATE'), 'PENDING') ON CONFLICT (user_id, written_date) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, content_text = EXCLUDED.content_text, visibility = EXCLUDED.visibility, analysis_status = CASE WHEN diaries.content_text IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.content_text THEN 'PENDING' ELSE diaries.analysis_status END, updated_at = now() RETURNING id, (xmax = 0) AS inserted
mapper.select: SELECT id, share_token::text AS share_token, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status FROM diaries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND written_date = #{date} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, share_token::text AS share_token, content, content_text, written_date, visibility, analysis_status FROM diaries WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT d.id AS id, d.content_text AS content, d.written_date AS written_date, d.analysis_status AS analysis_status, (SELECT op->'insert'->>'image' FROM jsonb_array_elements(d.content::jsonb -> 'ops') WITH ORDINALITY AS t(op, ord) WHERE op->'insert'->>'image' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ord LIMIT 1) AS thumbnail_url, (SELECT count(*)::int FROM jsonb_array_elements(d.content::jsonb -> 'ops') AS op WHERE op->'insert'->>'image' IS NOT NULL) AS image_count FROM diaries d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND to_char(d.written_date, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.written_date DESC, d.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE diaries SET content = #{content}, content_text = #{contentText}, visibility = #{visibility}, analysis_status = CASE WHEN content_text IS DISTINCT FROM #{contentText} THEN 'PENDING' ELSE analysis_status END, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
